titleZh: 最高人民法院关于适用《中华人民共和国企业破产法》若干问题的规定（一）
titleEn: SPC Interpretation (I) on Several Issues Concerning the Application of the Enterprise Bankruptcy Law
shortTitle: 企业破产法司法解释（一）
summaryZh: 聚焦破产案件受理标准、不能清偿到期债务与明显缺乏清偿能力的认定、管辖和程序衔接，是公司清算转入破产程序的基础性司法解释。
summaryEn: A foundational interpretation on acceptance standards for bankruptcy cases, the tests for inability to pay due debts and obvious lack of solvency, and the procedural bridge from liquidation disputes into bankruptcy.
